meta.title: A physical analysis of the prophage of Proteus mirabilis PM5006 -- Steyn and Pretorius 68 (11): 2909 -- Journal of General Virology

abstractHtml: Proteus mirabilis phage 5006M was investigated as a prophage by DNA hybridization. A physical map of the prophage was established and the site of integration was localized on the phage genome. Older reports that the phage is cryptic in P. mirabilis could not be verified.
